doctrine: The locks are reusable. The ship has not yet changed engines.

local_to_sdk_mapping.pino SENSE transport: configureSenseTransport — wire at service boot in aegis-transport.ts
local_to_sdk_mapping.externalRef findFirst pattern: checkIdempotency + buildIdempotencyFingerprint + adapter: wrap Prisma result

LOCK_4_rollback.sdk: NOT IN SDK — remains carbonx domain

required_adapters.name: carbonxFinancialScope
required_adapters.reason: SDK verifyScopedApprovalToken takes Record<string,unknown>; carbonx uses 7 named fields

required_adapters.name: aegis-transport.ts
required_adapters.reason: SDK emitAegisSenseEvent is transport-agnostic; carbonx pipes to pino logger

required_adapters.name: prismaIdempotencyAdapter
required_adapters.reason: SDK checkIdempotency is functional (no DB); carbonx calls prisma.etsTransaction.findFirst

migration_risk_rationale: 3 thin adapters required; all add wiring not logic; no lock weakened

batch_95_plan.step_2: Create src/lib/aegis-transport.ts — configure pino transport at boot
batch_95_plan.step_4: Replace ets.ts imports: verifyFinancialApprovalToken → verifyScopedApprovalToken from SDK
batch_95_plan.step_5: Replace ets.ts imports: verifyAndConsumeNonce, IrrNoApprovalError → from SDK
batch_95_plan.step_6: Replace ets-service.ts imports: emitAegisSenseEvent, digestApprovalToken → from SDK
batch_95_plan.step_7: Replace manual externalRef check in ets-service.ts with checkIdempotency pattern
batch_95_plan.step_9: Run carbonx Five Locks regression (Batch 96) to confirm no behavioral change

verdict_rationale: carbonx can migrate to @ankr/aegis-guard without semantic loss; migration not yet performed
